home.tagline: Predict ammonia losses. Compare strategies. Protect the climate and harvest more.
home.subtitle: Select a field on the map or search for a location, then start a calculation.
home.about_body: Ammonitor helps farmers and advisors make informed decisions about manure application. By combining real-time weather forecasts with the ALFAM2 emission model, it predicts how much ammonia (NH₃) will be lost after spreading — and how different application strategies compare over the next 8 days.
home.feature_compare_body: Vary application technique, time, dry matter, pH, incorporation — see which minimises loss.
home.feature_weather_body: Forecasts from Open-Meteo drive the model, so predictions reflect actual conditions.
home.feature_instant_body: Get an 8-day emission profile in seconds — no setup, no installation, no cost.
home.alfam2_body_post: model (Hafner et al.) is a semi-empirical model for predicting ammonia volatilisation from field-applied manure, developed from over 2,000 measurements across Europe. We gratefully acknowledge the ALFAM2 team for making their work openly available — without it, ammonitor would not be possible.
home.info_api_body_post: . Integrate ammonitor into your own tools.
home.info_free_body: No account, no subscription, no limits. Ammonitor will always be free to use.

calculation.compare_hint: Select a radio button to compare variants for that parameter
calculation.tip_click: Click a day group to see hourly details.
calculation.tip_tap: Tap a day group to see hourly details.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimer_body_1: The information provided by ammonitor is for general informational purposes only. All predictions are based on models and weather forecasts and may differ from actual conditions. No guarantee is made regarding the accuracy or completeness of the results.
imprint.disclaimer_body_2: Ammonitor is not a substitute for professional agricultural advice. Users should consult qualified advisors before making decisions based on the tool's output.
imprint.liability_body: The operator of this website is not liable for any damages arising from the use of the information or services provided, unless caused by intent or gross negligence.
imprint.copyright_body_pre: This project is licensed under the

privacy.title: Data Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Ammonitor takes data protection seriously. This policy describes what data is processed when you use this website and for what purposes.
privacy.no_personal_body: Ammonitor does not collect any personal data. There is no user registration, no login, and no user accounts. We use GoatCounter, a privacy-friendly analytics service that does not use cookies and does not collect personal data (see below).
privacy.data_provide_body: When you use the calculation feature, the following data is sent to our server:
privacy.data_provide_item_1: Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) — selected by you on the map or entered via search
privacy.data_provide_item_2: Calculation parameters (application method, manure properties, incorporation settings, timezone)
privacy.data_provide_after: This data is processed solely to compute the requested emission prediction and is not stored or logged after the response is returned.
privacy.third_party_body: When you use ammonitor, data is sent to the following external services:
privacy.tp_nominatim: If you search for an address, your search query is sent to the Nominatim geocoding service operated by the OpenStreetMap Foundation. See <1>OSMF privacy policy</1>.
privacy.tp_openmeteo: Weather forecast data is fetched from Open-Meteo based on the coordinates you select. See <1>Open-Meteo terms</1>.
privacy.tp_osm_tiles: Map tiles are loaded from OpenStreetMap servers to display the map. IP addresses may be logged by the tile server. See <1>OSMF privacy policy</1>.
privacy.tp_goatcounter: We use <1>GoatCounter</1>, a privacy-friendly web analytics service. GoatCounter does not use cookies, does not collect personal data, and does not track users across sites. Only anonymized page views are counted. See <2>GoatCounter privacy policy</2>.
privacy.logs_body: Our hosting provider (Fly.io) may log technical access data (IP address, timestamp, requested URL) as part of standard infrastructure operations. These logs are not accessible to us and are not used for tracking or profiling.
privacy.rights_body: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, and restriction of processing of your personal data. Since ammonitor does not store personal data, these rights are generally not applicable, but you may contact us at any time regarding data protection questions.
privacy.changes_body: This policy may be updated from time to time. The current version is always available at this page.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using ammonitor, you agree to the following terms. If you do not agree, please do not use this service.
terms.purpose_body: Ammonitor provides ammonia emission predictions based on the ALFAM2 model and weather forecast data. The tool is intended as a decision-support aid for farmers, advisors, and researchers.
terms.warranty_body: Ammonitor is provided "as is" without any warranty of any kind, express or implied. Predictions are model-based estimates and may deviate from actual field conditions. The accuracy of results depends on the quality of the input parameters and the underlying weather forecasts.
terms.advice_body: The results generated by ammonitor do not constitute professional agricultural or environmental advice. Users should consult qualified professionals before making decisions based on the tool's output. The operator assumes no responsibility for any actions taken based on the information provided.
terms.availability_body: The operator strives to keep ammonitor available but does not guarantee uninterrupted access. The service may be modified, suspended, or discontinued at any time without notice.
terms.license_body_pre: The ammonitor source code is licensed under the
terms.license_body_mid: By using this service, you acknowledge that any network use of the software entitles you to receive a copy of the source code under the terms of the AGPL-3.0. The source code is available on
terms.third_party_body: Ammonitor uses data and services from third parties:
terms.tp_alfam2: Emission predictions are based on the ALFAM2 model (Hafner et al.). See
terms.tp_osm: Geocoding and map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, licensed under
terms.tp_after: The operator does not guarantee the availability or accuracy of these third-party services.
terms.liability_body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the operator shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use ammonitor, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or crops.
terms.changes_body: These terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of ammonitor after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. The current version is always available at this page.
